results.title: Jordan fans serve 'mansaf' to Argentina supporters in heartwarming World Cup gesture
results.description: After their World Cup journey came to an end, Team Jordan expressed its gratitude by leaving traditional sweets, souvenirs, and a heartfelt thank you for tournament staff.

results.title: Albion bring in wide player as WSL rebuild continues
results.description: Albion have signed Poland forward Nadia Krezyman for their WSL squad.
